auth.bannerBody: Local token file: {{tokenPath}}. Paste the token value here.
auth.invalidBody: The current token was rejected. Read the latest token from {{tokenPath}} and try again.
auth.sessionBody: This same-origin Web page uses a local session cookie. Reload the page to establish a fresh local session.
auth.sessionInvalidBody: The local Web session is no longer valid. Reload the same-origin page to refresh the session.
auth.requiredBody: Enter the local API token to load protected runtime data.

onboarding.loadingBody: Trying local runtime, token pairing, config, and provider readiness.
onboarding.tokenPairingAutoInProgress: Trying lightweight auto pairing now. If you already have the local token, you can still paste it below.

actions.start_local_runtime: Start the local runtime and reload this page.
actions.enter_local_token: Paste the local API token to continue.
actions.create_local_config: Create the local config before entering chat.
actions.fix_local_config: Fix the local config and retry.
actions.configure_provider: Add a provider, model, and key before continuing.
actions.validate_provider_route: Check provider route diagnostics before continuing.
actions.refresh_local_session: Reload the same-origin page to refresh the local session.

form.baseUrlOrEndpointHelper: Paste a base URL or a full chat endpoint override. Leave it blank to use the provider default.
form.apiKeyPlaceholderConfigured: Leave blank to keep the current key
form.apiKeyHelper: For this first pass, the key is persisted with the local provider config.
form.apiKeyHelperConfigured: Leave this blank to keep the current key, or paste a new one to replace it.

errors.saveFailed: Provider setup could not be saved.
errors.apiKeyRequired: Enter an API key before saving provider setup.

preferences.promptAddendumPlaceholder: Optional extra instruction for future conversations
preferences.helper: These settings are optional. They shape later conversations, but they do not block entry.
preferences.saveFailed: Optional settings could not be saved.

validation.required: Run one quick provider validation before entering Web.
validation.ready: Provider validation passed for this setup.
validation.success: Provider validation passed. You can enter Web now.
validation.failed: Provider validation did not pass yet.

statuses.transport_failure: The provider endpoint could not be reached from the local runtime.
statuses.missing_credentials: The current provider config is still missing credentials.
statuses.auth_rejected: The provider rejected the configured key.
statuses.request_rejected: The provider received the validation request but rejected this setup.
statuses.upstream_unavailable: The provider endpoint responded, but it is not healthy enough right now.

runtimeOffline.title: Local runtime is offline
runtimeOffline.body: Web can open, but the local API is not reachable yet. Start the runtime first, then reload the page.

tokenPairing.title: Token pairing is still required
tokenPairing.body: This browser is not paired with the local API yet. Web will try one lightweight local pairing attempt first, then fall back to manual token entry if needed.

sessionRefresh.title: Local session needs a refresh
sessionRefresh.body: This same-origin Web page should establish its local session automatically. Reload the page to refresh the session, then continue.

missingConfig.title: Local config is still missing
missingConfig.body: The runtime is online, but the expected config file does not exist yet. Web still needs a first-run setup flow for this case.

configInvalid.title: Local config could not be loaded
configInvalid.body: A config file exists, but the runtime could not load it cleanly. This usually means the local config still needs to be fixed before chat can work.

providerSetup.title: Provider setup is still incomplete
providerSetup.body: The runtime is online, but the active provider is not configured enough to run chat yet.

providerUnreachable.title: Provider route still looks unhealthy
providerUnreachable.body: Basic config exists, but the active provider endpoint does not look reachable yet. Web should surface this before sending users into chat.

ready.title: Local setup looks ready
ready.body: Runtime, token pairing, config, and provider checks all look healthy. You can enter the Web Console now.

chrome.title: Local control surface for LoongClaw
chrome.subtitle: English-first bilingual console aligned with the main LoongClaw website.
